cases.name: impromptu-epic-shape
expected_behavior: Fetches full ticket bodies before deciding the shape, never titles alone
Treats the pair as an impromptu epic: one branch, one PR, Epic Mode
Confirms the inferred shape in one line before starting

cases.name: single-ticket-skips-plan
expected_behavior: Runs prep, then produce, then present — no plan phase
Moves the ticket to In Progress before the first line of code

cases.name: hold-the-pr-modifier
cases.prompt: Work ticket #77 but hold the PR until I say.
expected_behavior: Finishes produce and evidence but leaves the PR unopened
